script: echo '===== RESPONDER ERRORS LOG (full) =====' && cat /home/azureuser/.aixa-bot/responder-errors.log 2>/dev/null && echo && echo '===== RESPONDER DEBUG LOG (full) =====' && cat /home/azureuser/.aixa-bot/responder-debug.log 2>/dev/null && echo && echo '===== RESPONDER APP JOURNAL LAST 24H (excluding systemd lines) =====' && journalctl -u aixa-responder.service --since '24 hours ago' --no-pager 2>/dev/null | grep -v 'systemd\[1\]' | tail -60 && echo && echo '===== BOT APP JOURNAL LAST 24H =====' && journalctl -u aixa-bot.service --since '24 hours ago' --no-pager 2>/dev/null | grep -v 'systemd\[1\]' | tail -60 && echo && echo '===== ACTIVITIES METADATA (no message bodies) =====' && ALOG=/home/azureuser/.aixa-bot/activities.jsonl && echo "Total entries: $(wc -l < $ALOG)" && echo "File mtime: $(stat -c '%y' $ALOG)" && echo && echo 'Last 8 entries (timestamps + types only):' && tail -8 $ALOG | jq -r '"  " + (.timestamp // .time // "?") + " | type=" + (.type // .kind // "?") + " | from=" + ((.from.name // .from.id // "?") | tostring) + " | body_chars=" + (((.text // .message // "") | tostring | length) | tostring)' 2>&1 | head -20 && echo && echo '===== UNIQUE SENDERS EVER =====' && jq -r '.from.name // .from.id // "?"' $ALOG 2>/dev/null | sort -u | head -20 && echo && echo '===== RESPONDER RESTART POLICY =====' && systemctl show aixa-responder.service -p Restart -p RestartSec -p StartLimitBurst -p StartLimitIntervalSec
